title: First YouTube Upload — How to Fix Drill Bits
rawText: Lakshveer's first YouTube upload at age 4. How to Fix Drill Bits. Marks the start of his public building journey.

rawText: Lakshveer's first formal business pitch about DIY Cars project.

rawText: CircuitHeroes card game teaser launch. Educational electronics card game. India's youngest card game designer.

rawText: Launch of Lakshveer's DIY eBook — The Kids Book of Creative Ideas. 100+ sales. Available on ChhotaCreator.com.

rawText: Lakshveer participated in a panel discussion at TTOX 2024. CircuitHeroes was showcased here — India's youngest card game designer.

rawText: Lakshveer demonstrated his electronics and robotics projects to ISRO Chairman Shri S. Somanath. Discussion about student satellite programs. Video documented.

rawText: Lakshveer recognized at IITEX 2025, Hitex Hyderabad.

rawText: Lakshveer received the Malpani Foundation grant for CircuitHeroes — educational electronics card game with 300+ decks sold. ₹1,00,000 grant.

rawText: Drishtikon Yantra: Raspberry Pi-based wearable assistive vision device for visually impaired users. Special Mention at Param × Vedanta Makeathon.
